---
name: Docs bug
about: Report incorrect, stale, or confusing public docs
title: "Docs bug: "
labels: docs
---

## Page

Link the public page or Markdown file.

## Problem

Describe what is incorrect, stale, missing, or confusing.

## Expected Fix

Describe the smallest public-safe correction.

## Public Sources

Link public sources that support the correction. Do not paste credentials, account data, private
analytics, raw answer-engine output, or production readbacks.
